specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit (1903+)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4330 / AMD FX-6300
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.3 compatible GPU (Intel HD 4400 or better)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound compatible, <20ms latency capable
  • Additional Notes: 60Hz display required (not 59Hz, 144Hz, etc.). Requires guitar/bass with 1/4" output jack and USB audio interface. Rocksmith Real Tone Cable or ASIO interface recommended. Disable NVIDIA Shadowplay for best performance.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit (1903+) or Windows 11
  • Processor: Quad-core processor (Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD RX 560 or better with 2GB VRAM
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: ASIO-compatible audio interface (Focusrite Scarlett or similar)
  • Additional Notes: 60Hz display required (not 59Hz, 144Hz, etc.). Requires guitar/bass with 1/4" output jack and USB audio interface. Rocksmith Real Tone Cable or ASIO interface recommended. Disable NVIDIA Shadowplay for best performance.
